description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: image and deploy. In the image stage add a build job that uses the gcr.io/kaniko-project/executor:debug Docker image with an empty entrypoint, runs the command `/kaniko/executor --context "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}" --dockerfile "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/Dockerfile" --destination "${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_TAG}"` to build and push a Docker image, and is triggered only when the commit tag matches the regex ^image-v.+. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the image `${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:image-v1` with an empty entrypoint, runs `make` then `echo "PDFs generated, well done machine!"`, stores the `public/` directory as an artifact, and runs only on the default branch and when manually started. Publish the `public/` artifact as GitLab Pages.
